name: everything-claude-unity
description: The ultimate Claude Code toolkit for Unity game development. Production-ready agents, commands, skills, and safety hooks for building mobile games with natural language.
highlights: 20 specialized agents across 3 model tiers (haiku/sonnet/opus) with smart routing
Full workflow pipeline: clarify → plan → critic → execute → verify with automated fix loops
Unity MCP integration for scene building, profiling, testing, and builds
22 safety hooks with profile-gated activation (minimal / standard / strict)
41 knowledge skills covering Unity systems, gameplay patterns, genres, and third-party packages
Persistent structured state management with plan tracking and verification evidence
Benchmarking infrastructure for measuring and comparing agent quality
Security auditing, git hygiene, and multi-channel notifications
